title: Vendr Pricing Response Structure
description: Structural documentation for the Vendr pricing estimate response

fields.name: productId
fields.description: Unique product identifier from Vendr catalog

fields.name: priceRange
fields.description: Statistical price distribution from comparable real contracts

fields.name: p25
fields.description: 25th percentile — low end of fair range

fields.name: p75
fields.description: 75th percentile — high end of fair range

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence score 0.0-1.0 based on contract sample size

fields.name: sampleSize
fields.description: Number of comparable real contracts analyzed

fields.name: negotiationInsights
fields.description: Actionable guidance for negotiating this purchase
